ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., SEA, MIL) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium (city, state) */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bat_hand" TEXT /* Hand the player bats with (left, right, switch) */,
  "throw_hand" TEXT /* Hand the player throws with (left, right) */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (active, injured, retired) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league during the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "champion_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_author_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who added the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_note_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team in the season */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team in the season */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home record (wins-losses-ties) */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Away record (wins-losses-ties) */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Division record (wins-losses-ties) */,
  "interleague_record" TEXT /* Interleague record (wins-losses-ties) */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
